code:
%%{FinTech_LedgerService}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-10.02 — Transparency Report Lifecycle (FinTech_AuthVault)

[FinTech_AuthVault] --> DRAFT : ReportInitiated
note right of DRAFT
  Create report shell:
  • incident/ref IDs bound
  • scope, timeline, owners
  • initial checklist opened
end note

DRAFT --> DATA_GATHER : EvidenceRequested
note right of DATA_GATHER
  Collect evidence:
  • SIEM logs, ledger snapshots
  • config diffs, patches
  • governance directives
end note

DATA_GATHER --> AUTHORING : EvidenceCollected
note right of AUTHORING
  Compile narrative:
  • root cause, impact, fixes
  • timelines & tables
  • redactions planned
end note

AUTHORING --> LEGAL_REVIEW : DraftReady
LEGAL_REVIEW --> ETHICS_REVIEW : LegalCleared
ETHICS_REVIEW --> QA_REVIEW : EthicsCleared
QA_REVIEW --> SIGNING : QAApproved

%% Signing & generation
SIGNING --> GENERATED : ReportGenerated (FinTech_LedgerService)
note right of GENERATED
  Immutable bundle produced:
  • hashes, signatures, timestamp
  • public & internal versions
end note

GENERATED --> PUBLISHING : PublishRequested
PUBLISHING --> PUBLISHED : TransparencyReportPublished (FinTech_AuthVault)
PUBLISHED --> ARCHIVED : ArchiveScheduled
ARCHIVED --> [FinTech_AuthVault]

%% Corrections / amendments
PUBLISHED --> AMEND_REQ : CorrectionRequested
AMEND_REQ --> AUTHORING : AmendmentAuthorized

%% Exceptions / failure paths
DATA_GATHER --> FAILED : MissingEvidence / HashMismatch
AUTHORING --> FAILED : IncompleteNarrative
LEGAL_REVIEW --> FAILED : LegalBlock
ETHICS_REVIEW --> FAILED : EthicsBlock
QA_REVIEW --> FAILED : QAFailed
SIGNING --> FAILED : SignatureError
PUBLISHING --> FAILED : PublishError
FAILED --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway] : ReportAbandoned

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DRAFT,DATA_GATHER,AUTHORING,LEGAL_REVIEW,ETHICS_REVIEW,QA_REVIEW,SIGNING,GENERATED,PUBLISHING,PUBLISHED,ARCHIVED,AMEND_REQ,FAILED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech_AuthVault设计一个透明度报告的全生命周期流程。核心是从DRAFT开始，经过证据收集、撰写、多轮审核，最终发布并归档。同时要考虑发布后修正和异常失败的分支。
明白了。我梳理一下主干流程：DRAFT → DATA_GATHER → AUTHORING → LEGAL_REVIEW → ETHICS_REVIEW → QA_REVIEW → SIGNING → GENERATED → PUBLISHING → PUBLISHED → ARCHIVED。请问审核环节这三道关卡——法务、伦理、QA——是串行还是可以有并行？
串行。合规要求必须先过法务再过伦理，最后QA。另外SIGNING之后要调用FinTech_LedgerService生成不可篡改的最终报告包，这个节点叫GENERATED，需要标注清楚。
好的，主干已绘制。现在补充异常分支：每个环节都可能失败到FAILED状态，最终由FinTech_PaymentGateway废弃报告。还有发布后的修正流程——PUBLISHED可以触发AMEND_REQ，授权后回到AUTHORING重新编辑。
对，但AMEND_REQ的触发条件要明确标注为CorrectionRequested，而回到AUTHORING的转换条件是AmendmentAuthorized。另外DATA_GATHER和AUTHORING的失败条件也写清楚：MissingEvidence/HashMismatch，以及IncompleteNarrative。
已添加。LEGAL_REVIEW和ETHICS_REVIEW的失败分别标注为LegalBlock和EthicsBlock，QA_REVIEW是QAFailed，SIGNING是SignatureError，PUBLISHING是PublishError。所有失败最终汇聚到FAILED，然后流向FinTech_PaymentGateway。
等等，LEGAL_REVIEW到ETHICS_REVIEW的转换名我写错了，应该是LegalCleared，不是LegalApproved。还有ETHICS_REVIEW到QA_REVIEW是EthicsCleared。请修正。
已修正。另外为关键节点添加了注释：DRAFT阶段说明报告壳创建和检查清单，DATA_GATHER说明SIEM日志和账本快照收集，AUTHORING说明根因分析和修订计划，GENERATED说明哈希签名和时间戳的不可篡改包。整体样式用橙色高亮所有核心状态。
完美。最终确认：标题用SM-10.02 — Transparency Report Lifecycle，起始和结束都绑定FinTech_AuthVault，GENERATED的转换标注ReportGenerated并注明FinTech_LedgerService，PUBLISHED的转换标注TransparencyReportPublished。可以定稿了。
